content: Anyone within striking distance of New Hampshire? I started a meetup there. Still getting our footing but right now shooting for twice a month (one Weds and one Thurs), probably sticking to Dover, at a restaurant/bar just like Boston Open. But I'd like to do presentations at the makerspace in Portsmouth at some point. I have a few ideas there.
But for now we're meeting this week at Charros Mexican Cuisine in Dover NH at 19:00 Thursday July 16!
